title: Your favourite phallus
wikitext:
[]: Your favourite phallus             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Fri Mar 04, 2011 5:24 pm Because someone has to create it.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Fri Mar 04, 2011 5:27 pm Shinji's, because Gendo loves to suck dat sh*t all night long!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Mar 04, 2011 5:50 pm Shamshel not the very first mention? EGF, I am disappoint.

[]:             Quote Post by Crystal Wolf » Fri Mar 04, 2011 5:59 pm My favorite phallus is the one that gives this thread a good slap across the face.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Fri Mar 04, 2011 6:16 pm The one that's supposed to be there (you know, the back of the chair and stuff) in Episode 23. Okay, and Shamshel. That was for you, Mr. Tines.

[]:             Quote Post by Jessemon » Fri Mar 04, 2011 6:33 pm 1) At about the 11 min mark in episode 2 (when Misato is showing Shinji the city at dusk), I ALWAYS laugh at the penis. It's on the right side of the screen with the two globes. Shinji even says something like, "Amazing! The buildings are growing!!" I bet that's not the only thing growing : ) 2) Episode 15, at about the 10:27 mark, while Gendo and Shinji are at Yui's tombstone. The first one I posted is understandable. I'd get hard over Tokyo-3 as well (also, Misato is hot). The question HERE is WHY DOES GENDO HAVE A BONER? Is it a boner for Shinji? Or Yui? Or graveyards? [Edit] Whoops, you are right. Blame my dyslexia. Question still stands though, except for Shinji. Perhaps Anno is referencing the oedipus complex.[Edit]

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Mar 04, 2011 6:36 pm uhh, the shadow with "boner" is Shinji

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Fri Mar 04, 2011 6:58 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Shamshel not the very first mention? EGF, I am disappoint.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri Mar 04, 2011 7:21 pm Jessemon has more Freudian issues to work out than any member of the NGE cast.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Fri Mar 04, 2011 7:50 pm Azathoth wrote: Since his Rebuild reimagining as a dick with a horrifying flailing-armed vagina in it, I find he is no longer my favorite

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 04, 2011 8:29 pm Azathoth wrote: Since his Rebuild reimagining as a dick with a horrifying flailing-armed vagina in it, I find he is no longer my favorite

It's on the right side of the screen with the two globes. Shinji even says something like, "Amazing! The buildings are growing!!" I bet that's not the only thing growing : )

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Fri Mar 04, 2011 9:01 pm Oh yeah reminds me, why don't we have a Freud smiley yet?

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sat Mar 05, 2011 10:22 am I think this NGE EVA pride is going a bit too extreme... yet again, the films went one step more.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sat Mar 05, 2011 12:24 pm Reichu wrote: My favorite phallus is Yui's horn. (I think there's a picture somewhere of Gendo getting sodomized by it.)

[]:             Quote Post by Jessemon » Sat Mar 05, 2011 12:27 pm esselfortium wrote: Anno has more Freudian issues to work out than any member of the NGE cast.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Mar 05, 2011 12:41 pm I still don't see a single fucking penis in either image. Especially not in tokio-3 one.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Mar 05, 2011 1:10 pm Jessemon wrote: 1) At about the 11 min mark in episode 2 (when Misato is showing Shinji the city at dusk), I ALWAYS laugh at the penis 2) Episode 15, at about the 10:27 mark, while Gendo and Shinji are at Yui's tombstone.

[]:             Quote Post by Jessemon » Sat Mar 05, 2011 1:17 pm Xard wrote: I still don't see a single fucking penis in either image. Especially not in tokio-3 one.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Sat Mar 05, 2011 1:26 pm I'm reminded of the part in Notenki Memoirs, where Takeda mentioned about playing with the Ideon startup sequence -- and the emblem -- to form a symbolic vagina.
